title: Korak 6

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: You should push parts[i].trim() into trimmedParts inside the loop.
parseCard should return an array where each element has no leading or trailing whitespace.
When called with " A | B | C | D ", the first element of the returned array should be "A".

description:
Metoda .trim() uklanja razmake sa obe strane niza karaktera. Na primer, " hello ".trim() vraća "hello".

Unutar tela petlje, dodajte parts[i].trim() u trimmedParts. Zatim ažurirajte postojeću izjavu return da vraća trimmedParts umesto parts.

Nakon ovog koraka, logovani izlaz bi trebalo da prikaže čiste vrednosti bez dodatnih razmaka.
